```
<path>C:\Users\User\Desktop\Peguita\Codigos wao\APP manten\openspec\changes\mantenti-mvp\design.md</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>
1: # Design: Mantenti MVP
2: 
3: ## Technical Approach
4: 
5: Full-stack responsive web application for IT maintenance technicians. Monorepo (pnpm workspaces) with Express/Prisma/PostgreSQL backend, Vue 3/Vite/Tailwind frontend, and shared TypeScript types. The design follows the locked architecture from the proposal: JWT auth (single role), hybrid next-maintenance model, polymorphic attachments, server-side PDF generation with Puppeteer→PDFKit fallback, and in-app + web push notifications.
6: 
7: ## A. System Overview
8: 
9: ```
10: ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
11: │                     Browser (Vue 3 SPA)                      │
12: │  ┌──────────┐ ┌──────────┐ ┌──────────┐ ┌───────────────┐  │
13: │  │  Login   │ │ Clients  │ │ Maint.   │ │ Notifications │  │
14: │  │  Page    │ │  List    │ │  Flow    │ │   Bell/Push   │  │
15: │  └──────────┘ └──────────┘ └──────────┘ └───────────────┘  │
16: │         │           │            │              │            │
17: │         └───────────┴────────────┴──────────────┘            │
18: │                         │ HTTPS / JSON                       │
19: │                    Service Worker (push)                      │
20: └─────────────────────────┬───────────────────────────────────┘
21:                           │
22: ┌─────────────────────────┴───────────────────────────────────┐
23: │                   Express API (Node 20+)                     │
24: │  ┌────────┐ ┌──────────┐ ┌──────────┐ ┌────────────────┐   │
25: │  │  Auth  │ │  CRUD    │ │  Maint.  │ │  PDF Generator │   │
26: │  │  JWT   │ │  Routes  │ │  Workflow│ │  Puppeteer/    │   │
27: │  │  Cookie│ │  (REST)  │ │  Engine  │ │  PDFKit        │   │
28: │  └────────┘ └──────────┘ └──────────┘ └────────────────┘   │
29: │  ┌────────────────┐ ┌──────────────────────────────────┐    │
30: │  │  Notification  │ │  Attachment Storage              │    │
31: │  │  Cron (node-   │ │  (local fs → S3-ready)           │    │
32: │  │   cron)        │ │                                  │    │
33: │  └────────────────┘ └──────────────────────────────────┘    │
34: │                         │                                    │
35: │                    Prisma ORM                                │
36: └─────────────────────────┬───────────────────────────────────┘
37:                           │
38:               ┌───────────┴───────────┐
39:               │   PostgreSQL 15+      │
40:               │   (9 tables)          │
41:               └───────────────────────┘
42: ```
43: 
44: ## B. Data Model
45: 
46: ### Prisma Schema
47: 
48: ```prisma
49: generator client {
50:   provider = "prisma-client-js"
51: }
52: 
53: datasource db {
54:   provider = "postgresql"
55:   url      = env("DATABASE_URL")
56: }
57: 
58: // ─── Users ───────────────────────────────────────────────
59: model User {
60:   id            String   @id @default(uuid())
61:   username      String   @unique
62:   passwordHash  String   @map("password_hash")
63:   fullName      String   @map("full_name")
64:   createdAt     DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")
65:   updatedAt     DateTime @updatedAt @map("updated_at")
66: 
67:   maintenances  Maintenance[]
68:   notifications Notification[]
69: 
70:   @@map("users")
71: }
72: 
73: // ─── Clients ─────────────────────────────────────────────
74: model Client {
75:   id                      String    @id @default(uuid())
76:   name                    String
77:   location                String?
78:   contactName             String?   @map("contact_name")
79:   contactPhone            String?   @map("contact_phone")
80:   contactEmail            String?   @map("contact_email")
81:   frequencyDays           Int?      @map("frequency_days")
82:   nextMaintenanceBaseAt   DateTime? @map("next_maintenance_base_at")
83:   nextMaintenanceAgreedAt DateTime? @map("next_maintenance_agreed_at")
84:   nextMaintenanceAt       DateTime? @map("next_maintenance_at") // effective
85:   createdAt               DateTime  @default(now()) @map("created_at")
86:   updatedAt               DateTime  @updatedAt @map("updated_at")
87: 
88:   equipment     Equipment[]
89:   maintenances  Maintenance[]
90:   templates     Template[]
91: 
92:   @@index([nextMaintenanceAt])
93:   @@map("clients")
94: }
95: 
96: // ─── Equipment ───────────────────────────────────────────
97: model Equipment {
98:   id         String          @id @default(uuid())
99:   clientId   String          @map("client_id")
100:   name       String
101:   ip         String?
102:   mac        String?
103:   serial     String?
104:   assignedTo String?         @map("assigned_to")
105:   status     EquipmentStatus @default(ACTIVE)
106:   createdAt  DateTime        @default(now()) @map("created_at")
107:   updatedAt  DateTime        @updatedAt @map("updated_at")
108: 
109:   client         Client            @relation(fields: [clientId], references: [id])
110:   maintenanceItems MaintenanceItem[]
111:   templateItems  TemplateItem[]
112: 
113:   @@index([clientId])
114:   @@map("equipment")
115: }
116: 
117: enum EquipmentStatus {
118:   ACTIVE
119:   INACTIVE
120:   UNDER_MAINTENANCE
121:   DECOMMISSIONED
122: }
123: 
124: // ─── Action Types ────────────────────────────────────────
125: model ActionType {
126:   id        String  @id @default(uuid())
127:   name      String  @unique
128:   color     String?
129:   icon      String?
130:   isDefault Boolean @default(false) @map("is_default")
131:   createdAt DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")
132: 
133:   maintenanceItems MaintenanceItem[]
134: 
135:   @@map("action_types")
136: }
137: 
138: // ─── Maintenances ────────────────────────────────────────
139: model Maintenance {
140:   id          String            @id @default(uuid())
141:   clientId    String            @map("client_id")
142:   technicianId String           @map("technician_id")
143:   status      MaintenanceStatus @default(DRAFT)
144:   notes       String?
145:   signatureData String?         @map("signature_data") // base64 PNG
146:   pdfPath     String?           @map("pdf_path")
147:   pdfEngine   String?           @map("pdf_engine") // "puppeteer" | "pdfkit"
148:   closedAt    DateTime?         @map("closed_at")
149:   createdAt   DateTime          @default(now()) @map("created_at")
150:   updatedAt   DateTime          @updatedAt @map("updated_at")
151: 
152:   client     Client            @relation(fields: [clientId], references: [id])
153:   technician User              @relation(fields: [technicianId], references: [id])
154:   items      MaintenanceItem[]
155:   attachments Attachment[]
156: 
157:   @@index([clientId, createdAt(sort: Desc)])
158:   @@index([status])
159:   @@map("maintenances")
160: }
161: 
162: enum MaintenanceStatus {
163:   DRAFT
164:   IN_PROGRESS
165:   CLOSED
166: }
167: 
168: // ─── Maintenance Items ───────────────────────────────────
169: model MaintenanceItem {
170:   id            String   @id @default(uuid())
171:   maintenanceId String   @map("maintenance_id")
172:   equipmentId   String   @map("equipment_id")
173:   actionTypeId  String?  @map("action_type_id")
174:   observations  String?
175:   completedAt   DateTime? @map("completed_at")
176:   createdAt     DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")
177:   updatedAt     DateTime @updatedAt @map("updated_at")
178: 
179:   maintenance Maintenance @relation(fields: [maintenanceId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
180:   equipment   Equipment   @relation(fields: [equipmentId], references: [id])
181:   actionType  ActionType? @relation(fields: [actionTypeId], references: [id])
182:   attachments Attachment[]
183: 
184:   @@unique([maintenanceId, equipmentId])
185:   @@map("maintenance_items")
186: }
187: 
188: // ─── Attachments (Polymorphic) ───────────────────────────
189: model Attachment {
190:   id           String           @id @default(uuid())
191:   scope        AttachmentScope
192:   parentId     String           @map("parent_id")
193:   fileName     String           @map("file_name")
194:   mimeType     String           @map("mime_type")
195:   sizeBytes    Int              @map("size_bytes")
196:   storagePath  String           @map("storage_path")
197:   createdAt    DateTime         @default(now()) @map("created_at")
198: 
199:   @@index([scope, parentId])
200:   @@map("attachments")
201: }
202: 
203: enum AttachmentScope {
204:   MAINTENANCE
205:   MAINTENANCE_ITEM
206: }
207: 
208: // ─── Templates ───────────────────────────────────────────
209: model Template {
210:   id          String   @id @default(uuid())
211:   clientId    String   @map("client_id")
212:   name        String
213:   description String?
214:   createdAt   DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")
215:   updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt @map("updated_at")
216: 
217:   client Client         @relation(fields: [clientId], references: [id])
218:   items  TemplateItem[]
219: 
220:   @@unique([clientId, name])
221:   @@map("templates")
222: }
223: 
224: // ─── Template Items ──────────────────────────────────────
225: model TemplateItem {
226:   id          String @id @default(uuid())
227:   templateId  String @map("template_id")
228:   equipmentId String @map("equipment_id")
229:   sortOrder   Int    @default(0) @map("sort_order")
230: 
231:   template  Template  @relation(fields: [templateId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
232:   equipment Equipment @relation(fields: [equipmentId], references: [id])
233: 
234:   @@unique([templateId, equipmentId])
235:   @@map("template_items")
236: }
237: 
238: // ─── Notifications ───────────────────────────────────────
239: model Notification {
240:   id        String   @id @default(uuid())
241:   userId    String   @map("user_id")
242:   title     String
243:   body      String
244:   isRead    Boolean  @default(false) @map("is_read")
245:   clientId  String?  @map("client_id")
246:   createdAt DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")
247: 
248:   user User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])
249: 
250:   @@index([userId, isRead, createdAt(sort: Desc)])
251:   @@map("notifications")
252: }
253: 
254: // ─── Push Subscriptions ─────────────────────────────────
255: model PushSubscription {
256:   id        String @id @default(uuid())
257:   userId    String @map("user_id")
258:   endpoint  String @unique
259:   p256dh    String
260:   auth      String
261:   createdAt DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")
262: 
263:   @@map("push_subscriptions")
264: }
265: ```
266: 
267: ### Next-Maintenance: 3-State Model
268: 
269: | Field | Source | Computed When |
270: |-------|--------|---------------|
271: | `next_maintenance_base_at` | `last_closed_maintenance.closed_at + frequency_days` | On maintenance close |
272: | `next_maintenance_agreed_at` | Technician sets manually | On client edit |
273: | `next_maintenance_at` (effective) | `agreed_at ?? base_at`, overridable | On any of the above changes |
274: 
275: **Effective date logic** (in service layer, not DB trigger):
276: ```
277: effective = manual_override ?? agreed_at ?? base_at
278: ```
279: 
280: ## C. REST API Contract
281: 
282: ### Auth
283: 
284: | Method | Path | Auth | Request | Response |
285: |--------|------|------|---------|----------|
286: | POST | `/api/auth/login` | No | `{ username, password }` | `200 { user }` + Set-Cookie |
287: | POST | `/api/auth/logout` | Yes | — | `204` + Clear-Cookie |
288: | GET | `/api/auth/me` | Yes | — | `200 { user }` |
289: | POST | `/api/auth/refresh` | Yes (cookie) | — | `200` + new Set-Cookie |
290: 
291: ### Clients
292: 
293: | Method | Path | Auth | Request | Response |
294: |--------|------|------|---------|----------|
295: | GET | `/api/clients` | Yes | `?q=&status=` | `200 { clients[] }` |
296: | POST | `/api/clients` | Yes | `{ name, location, contact*, frequencyDays }` | `201 { client }` |
297: | GET | `/api/clients/:id` | Yes | — | `200 { client, equipment[], templates[] }` |
298: | PATCH | `/api/clients/:id` | Yes | partial fields | `200 { client }` |
299: | DELETE | `/api/clients/:id` | Yes | — | `204` or `409` |
300: | GET | `/api/clients/:id/history` | Yes | `?page=&limit=` | `200 { maintenances[], total }` |
301: 
302: ### Equipment
303: 
304: | Method | Path | Auth | Request | Response |
305: |--------|------|------|---------|----------|
306: | GET | `/api/clients/:clientId/equipment` | Yes | `?status=` | `200 { equipment[] }` |
307: | POST | `/api/clients/:clientId/equipment` | Yes | `{ name, ip, mac, serial, assignedTo, status }` | `201 { equipment }` |
308: | PATCH | `/api/equipment/:id` | Yes | partial fields | `200 { equipment }` |
309: | DELETE | `/api/equipment/:id` | Yes | — | `204` or `409` |
310: 
311: ### Action Types
312: 
313: | Method | Path | Auth | Request | Response |
314: |--------|------|------|---------|----------|
315: | GET | `/api/action-types` | Yes | — | `200 { actionTypes[] }` |
316: | POST | `/api/action-types` | Yes | `{ name, color?, icon? }` | `201 { actionType }` |
317: | PATCH | `/api/action-types/:id` | Yes | `{ name?, color?, icon? }` | `200 { actionType }` |
318: | DELETE | `/api/action-types/:id` | Yes | — | `204` or `409` |
319: 
320: ### Maintenances
321: 
322: | Method | Path | Auth | Request | Response |
323: |--------|------|------|---------|----------|
324: | POST | `/api/maintenances` | Yes | `{ clientId, equipmentIds[], templateId? }` | `201 { maintenance, items[] }` |
325: | GET | `/api/maintenances/:id` | Yes | — | `200 { maintenance, items[], attachments[] }` |
326: | PATCH | `/api/maintenances/:id` | Yes | `{ notes?, status? }` | `200 { maintenance }` |
327: | PATCH | `/api/maintenances/:id/items/:itemId` | Yes | `{ actionTypeId, observations }` | `200 { item }` |
328: | POST | `/api/maintenances/:id/close` | Yes | `{ signatureData (base64) }` | `200 { maintenance, pdfPath }` |
329: | GET | `/api/maintenances/:id/pdf` | Yes | — | `200 application/pdf` |
330: 
331: ### Attachments
332: 
333: | Method | Path | Auth | Request | Response |
334: |--------|------|------|---------|----------|
335: | POST | `/api/attachments` | Yes | `multipart: file, scope, parentId` | `201 { attachment }` |
336: | GET | `/api/attachments/:id` | Yes | — | `200 file stream` |
337: | DELETE | `/api/attachments/:id` | Yes | — | `204` |
338: 
339: Scope encoding: `scope` field in multipart body is `"maintenance"` | `"maintenance_item"`, `parentId` is the UUID of the target.
340: 
341: ### Templates
342: 
343: | Method | Path | Auth | Request | Response |
344: |--------|------|------|---------|----------|
345: | GET | `/api/clients/:clientId/templates` | Yes | — | `200 { templates[] }` |
346: | POST | `/api/clients/:clientId/templates` | Yes | `{ name, description?, equipmentIds[] }` | `201 { template }` |
347: | PATCH | `/api/templates/:id` | Yes | `{ name?, description?, equipmentIds? }` | `200 { template }` |
348: | DELETE | `/api/templates/:id` | Yes | — | `204` |
349: 
350: ### Notifications
351: 
352: | Method | Path | Auth | Request | Response |
353: |--------|------|------|---------|----------|
354: | GET | `/api/notifications` | Yes | `?unreadOnly=true` | `200 { notifications[], unreadCount }` |
355: | PATCH | `/api/notifications/:id/read` | Yes | — | `200` |
356: | POST | `/api/notifications/read-all` | Yes | — | `200` |
357: | POST | `/api/push/subscribe` | Yes | `{ endpoint, keys: { p256dh, auth } }` | `201` |
358: 
359: ## D. Authentication & Authorization
360: 
361: ### JWT Strategy
362: 
363: | Decision | Choice | Rationale |
364: |----------|--------|-----------|
365: | Token storage | httpOnly + Secure + SameSite=Lax cookie | XSS-resistant; no localStorage token theft vector |
366: | Access token TTL | 15 minutes | Short window limits exposure if cookie is somehow leaked |
367: | Refresh strategy | Rotating refresh token in separate httpOnly cookie | 7-day sliding window; single-use with family tracking |
368: | Password hashing | bcrypt (cost 12) | Industry standard, resistant to GPU attacks |
369: 
370: ### Middleware Chain
371: 
372: ```
373: Request → cors → cookie-parser → authMiddleware → rateLimiter → route
374: ```
375: 
376: **`authMiddleware`**: reads `accessToken` cookie → verifies JWT → attaches `req.user = { id, username }`. No role check (single role MVP). Returns 401 if missing/expired.
377: 
378: **Refresh flow**: on 401, frontend calls `POST /api/auth/refresh` (refresh cookie auto-sent) → new access token issued. If refresh token expired → redirect to login.
379: 
380: ### No Admin Role
381: 
382: Single implicit role "técnico". Every authenticated request is authorized. If RBAC is needed later, add a `role` enum column to `users` — migration is additive.
383: 
384: ## E. PDF Generation Pipeline
385: 
386: ```
387: POST /maintenances/:id/close
388:          │
389:          ▼
390: ┌─────────────────────┐
391: │  1. Validate & Save │
392: │  signature + status │
393: │  → CLOSED           │
394: └─────────┬───────────┘
395:           │
396:           ▼
397: ┌─────────────────────┐
398: │  2. Fetch Data      │
399: │  maintenance + items│
400: │  + attachments +    │
401: │  client + tech      │
402: └─────────┬───────────┘
403:           │
404:           ▼
405: ┌─────────────────────┐     ┌─────────────────────┐
406: │  3. Render HTML     │────▶│  4. Puppeteer       │
407: │  (Handlebars/EJS)   │     │  page.pdf({A4})     │
408: │  - Header/logo      │     │  - Embed signature  │
409: │  - Items table      │     │  - Embed photos     │
410: │  - Photos grid      │     │  - Write PDF        │
411: │  - Signature block  │     │    to storage       │
412: └─────────────────────┘     └─────────┬───────────┘
413:                                        │
414:                                   FAIL?│
415:                                        ▼
416:                               ┌─────────────────────┐
417:                               │  5. PDFKit Fallback │
418:                               │  Simplified layout  │
419:                               │  (no HTML render)   │
420:                               │  Text + images only │
421:                               └─────────┬───────────┘
422:                                        │
423:                                        ▼
424:                               ┌─────────────────────┐
425:                               │  6. Update DB       │
426:                               │  pdfPath, pdfEngine │
427:                               │  Recalculate next   │
428:                               │  maintenance dates  │
429:                               └─────────────────────┘
430: ```
431: 
432: **Puppeteer config**: `headless: 'shell'`, `--no-sandbox`, single shared browser instance (lazy-init, reused across requests). Memory limit: if Chromium RSS > 512MB, kill and respawn.
433: 
434: **PDFKit fallback trigger**: catch Puppeteer timeout (30s) or OOM. PDFKit template is simpler — no HTML/CSS, direct text positioning. Accept visual variance.
435: 
436: ## F. Frontend Architecture
437: 
438: ### Router Structure
439: 
440: ```
441: /login                          → LoginPage
442: /                               → redirect to /clients
443: /clients                        → ClientListPage
444: /clients/:id                    → ClientDetailPage
445:   ├── ?tab=equipment            → EquipmentTab
446:   ├── ?tab=templates            → TemplatesTab
447:   ├── ?tab=history              → HistoryTab
448:   └── ?tab=maintenance          → (redirect to /maintenances/new?clientId=)
449: /maintenances/new?clientId=     → MaintenanceStartPage (select equipment/template)
450: /maintenances/:id               → MaintenanceFlowPage
451:   ├── step=items                → PerItemFormStep
452:   ├── step=report               → ReportReviewStep
453:   ├── step=signature            → SignatureStep
454:   └── step=done                 → CompletionStep
455: /templates                      → (accessed via client detail)
456: /notifications                  → NotificationsPage
457: ```
458: 
459: ### State Management (Pinia Stores)
460: 
461: | Store | Responsibility |
462: |-------|---------------|
463: | `useAuthStore` | login/logout, user state, token refresh interceptor |
464: | `useClientStore` | client list, CRUD, current client detail |
465: | `useEquipmentStore` | equipment per client, CRUD |
466: | `useMaintenanceDraftStore` | current draft: selected items, per-item form state, attachments queue |
467: | `useNotificationStore` | unread count, notification list, mark-read |
468: | `useActionTypeStore` | global action types list (cached, rarely changes) |
469: 
470: ### Maintenance Flow Component Tree
471: 
472: ```
473: MaintenanceFlowPage
474: ├── StepIndicator (1-2-3-4)
475: ├── PerItemFormStep
476: │   └── ItemCard (per equipment)
477: │       ├── ActionTypeSelect (+ inline create)
478: │       ├── ObservationsTextarea
479: │       └── PhotoUpload (multi, client-resize)
480: ├── ReportReviewStep
481: │   ├── SummaryTable
482: │   ├── PhotoGallery (all photos, grouped)
483: │   └── GeneralPhotoUpload
484: ├── SignatureStep
485: │   ├── SignaturePad (signature_pad lib, canvas)
486: │   ├── ClearButton
487: │   └── SubmitButton
488: └── CompletionStep
489:     ├── PdfStatus (generating / ready)
490:     └── BackToClientButton
491: ```
492: 
493: ### Signature Capture
494: 
495: - Library: `signature_pad` (lightweight, touch-friendly)
496: - Canvas: min 300x100px, responsive width (100% container)
497: - Export: `toDataURL('image/png')` → base64 string → POST to close endpoint
498: - Validation: check bounding box of drawn pixels ≥ 300x100px
499: 
500: ### Photo Upload
501: 
502: - Client-side resize: `canvas.drawImage` to max 1920px long edge, JPEG quality 0.85
503: - Upload: `multipart/form-data`, one file per request (simpler retry)
504: - Limits: 10MB per file (pre-resize), 20 photos per maintenance
505: - Progress: per-file progress bar via `XMLHttpRequest.upload.onprogress`
506: 
507: ### Notifications (Frontend)
508: 
509: - Bell icon in top bar with unread badge (from `useNotificationStore`)
510: - Drawer: slides from right on mobile, dropdown on desktop
511: - Push permission: request on first login after push setup
512: - Service worker: registered at `/sw.js` (root scope), handles `push` event → `self.registration.showNotification()`
513: 
514: ## G. Notifications (Backend)
515: 
516: ### Cron Job
517: 
518: ```
519: node-cron schedule: "0 9 * * *" (daily at 09:00 server local time)
520: ```
521: 
522: **Algorithm**:
523: 1. Query clients where `next_maintenance_at` is in {today, today+1d, today+3d}
524: 2. For each match, check `notifications` table for existing reminder with same `(clientId, window)` in last 24h
525: 3. If no duplicate → insert `Notification` for all users + send web push to all subscribed devices
526: 
527: ### Web Push
528: 
529: - VAPID keys: generated once via `web-push generate-vapid-keys`, stored in `.env`
530: - `web-push` npm package sends to each `PushSubscription` for subscribed users
531: - Service worker scope: `/` (root) — registered from `public/sw.js`
532: - Payload: `{ title, body, icon, data: { clientId } }`
533: 
534: ### Timezone Decision
535: 
536: Server runs in UTC. Cron fires at 09:00 UTC. For MVP, this is acceptable. If the technician is in a different timezone, store a `timezone` field on `users` later and adjust cron query window.
537: 
538: ## H. File & Attachment Storage
539: 
540: ### Local Filesystem (MVP)
541: 
542: ```
543: storage/
544: ├── attachments/
545: │   └── {YYYY}/{MM}/
546: │       └── {uuid}.{ext}
547: ├── pdfs/
548: │   └── {YYYY}/{MM}/
549: │       └── {maintenance-id}.pdf
550: └── signatures/
551:     └── {YYYY}/{MM}/
552:         └── {maintenance-id}.png
553: ```
554: 
555: ### Storage Abstraction
556: 
557: ```typescript
558: interface StorageProvider {
559:   save(file: Buffer, path: string, contentType: string): Promise<string>;
560:   read(path: string): Promise<Buffer>;
561:   delete(path: string): Promise<void>;
562:   getUrl(path: string): string;
563: }
564: 
565: class LocalStorageProvider implements StorageProvider { ... }
566: // Future: class S3StorageProvider implements StorageProvider { ... }
567: ```
568: 
569: **URL strategy**: `/api/attachments/:id` streams the file (auth-checked). No direct file URLs in MVP (security). The `getUrl()` method returns the API path, not the filesystem path.
570: 
571: **File naming**: `{uuid}.{ext}` where ext is derived from mime type. Prevents collisions and path traversal.
572: 
573: **Content-type**: stored in DB (`mime_type`), served from DB metadata (not file extension sniffing).
574: 
575: ## I. Folder Structure
576: 
577: ```
578: app-manten/                          ← monorepo root
579: ├── pnpm-workspace.yaml
580: ├── package.json                     ← root scripts (dev, build, db:migrate)
581: ├── .env.example
582: ├── .gitignore

655: │           │   ├── layout/
656: │           │   │   ├── AppHeader.vue
657: │           │   │   ├── AppNav.vue
658: │           │   │   └── NotificationBell.vue
659: │           │   ├── clients/
660: │           │   │   ├── ClientCard.vue
661: │           │   │   └── ClientForm.vue
662: │           │   ├── equipment/
663: │           │   │   ├── EquipmentList.vue
664: │           │   │   └── EquipmentForm.vue
665: │           │   ├── maintenance/
666: │           │   │   ├── ItemCard.vue
667: │           │   │   ├── ActionTypeSelect.vue
668: │           │   │   ├── PhotoUpload.vue
669: │           │   │   ├── SignaturePad.vue
670: │           │   │   ├── StepIndicator.vue
671: │           │   │   └── PdfStatus.vue
672: │           │   ├── history/
673: │           │   │   └── MaintenanceHistoryList.vue
674: │           │   └── templates/
675: │           │       └── TemplateSelector.vue
676: │           ├── composables/
677: │           │   ├── usePhotoResize.ts
678: │           │   └── usePushSubscription.ts
679: │           ├── lib/
680: │           │   ├── api.ts            ← axios instance + interceptors
681: │           │   └── utils.ts
682: │           └── types/
683: │               └── index.ts          ← re-exports from @mantenti/types
684: ├── packages/
685: │   └── types/                        ← shared TypeScript types
686: │       ├── package.json
687: │       ├── tsconfig.json
688: │       └── src/
689: │           ├── index.ts
690: │           ├── api.ts                ← request/response DTOs
691: │           └── models.ts             ← domain model types
692: └── storage/                          ← local file storage (gitignored)
693:     ├── attachments/
694:     ├── pdfs/
695:     └── signatures/
696: ```
697: 
698: **Monorepo justification**: shared types prevent drift between API and frontend. pnpm workspaces are lightweight, no Turborepo needed for 2 apps + 1 package.
699: 
700: ## J. Key Tradeoffs & Decisions
701: 
702: | # | Decision | Justification |
703: |---|----------|---------------|
704: | 1 | Express over Fastify | MVP familiarity, hiring pool, middleware ecosystem. Fastify is faster but Express is "good enough" for <100 concurrent users. |
705: | 2 | httpOnly cookie over localStorage | XSS-resistant. Slightly more complex CSRF handling (SameSite=Lax covers it for same-origin). |
706: | 3 | node-cron in-process over BullMQ/Redis | Zero infra for MVP. Single-process means no job dedup needed. Swap to BullMQ when horizontal scaling is needed. |
707: | 4 | Local filesystem over S3 from day one | MVP runs on single server. Storage abstraction makes migration trivial later. |
708: | 5 | Puppeteer + PDFKit dual engine | Puppeteer gives pixel-perfect HTML/CSS PDFs. PDFKit is the safety net. Accepting visual variance in fallback is the tradeoff. |
709: | 6 | Monorepo with shared types | Prevents API↔frontend type drift. Single `pnpm install`, single CI pipeline. |
710: | 7 | Polymorphic attachment via `scope` enum + `parent_id` | Simpler than separate join tables. Index on `(scope, parent_id)` makes queries fast. |
711: | 8 | Client-side photo resize | Reduces upload time on mobile networks. Server still enforces 10MB as safety net. |
712: | 9 | Signature as base64 in DB | Simplifies PDF generation (no file read needed). Base64 strings are ~1.3x larger but signatures are small (<50KB typical). |
713: | 10 | No offline/PWA | Adds massive complexity. Technicians are assumed to have connectivity at client sites. |
714: 
715: ## K. Open Design Questions
716: 
717: - [ ] **Timezone**: Server cron at 09:00 UTC may not match technician's local 09:00. Acceptable for MVP if all users are in same timezone? (Flag for v2: per-user timezone + adjusted cron window.)
718: - [ ] **Signature min dimensions**: Spec says 300x100px canvas. Should we validate the actual drawn bounding box, or just the canvas size? (Decision: canvas size only — simpler, and a 300x100 canvas with a tiny dot is still "signed".)
719: - [ ] **Photo limit enforcement**: 20 photos per maintenance — is this across ALL items + general, or per-item? (Decision: global per maintenance, as spec implies.)
720: - [ ] **VAPID key generation**: One-time `web-push generate-vapid-keys` → `.env`. If `.env` is lost, old push subscriptions break. Acceptable for MVP? (Yes — regenerate + re-subscribe.)
721: - [ ] **Puppeteer memory**: On a 1GB VPS, Chromium may OOM. The PDFKit fallback handles this, but should we set a hard RSS limit (e.g., 512MB) and auto-kill? (Decision: yes, with auto-respawn.)
722: - [ ] **PDF storage**: Keep PDFs forever or set retention? (Decision: forever for MVP. Add retention policy in v2.)
723: - [ ] **Concurrent maintenance edits**: Two técnicos editing the same draft? (Decision: last-write-wins for MVP. Optimistic locking in v2 if needed.)
724: 
725: ## Testing Strategy
726: 
727: | Layer | What | Approach |
728: |-------|------|----------|
729: | Unit | Services (next-maintenance calc, auth, validation) | Vitest, mock Prisma |
730: | Integration | API endpoints, PDF generation | Supertest + test DB (docker-compose) |
731: | E2E | Full maintenance flow | Playwright (mobile viewport 375px) |
732: 
733: ## Migration / Rollout
734: 
735: No migration required — greenfield project. Seed script creates default action types on first `prisma db push`.

(End of file - total 735 lines)
</content>
```

<type>file</type>
<content>
1: # Proposal: mantenti-mvp
2: 
3: ## Intent
4: 
5: Responsive web app for IT technicians to manage clients, equipment, and maintenance workflows — from equipment selection through signed PDF reports.
6: 
7: ## Scope
8: 
9: ### In Scope
10: - JWT login, single role "técnico", no admin
11: - Client CRUD (cards) with location, contact, next-maintenance
12: - Equipment CRUD per client (IP, MAC, serial, user, status)
13: - Maintenance flow: select equipment → log actions → report → signature → signed PDF
14: - Manual mode + Template mode (pre-saved equipment sets)
15: - Dynamic action types (técnico-created, pre-seeded defaults)
16: - Client history with linked PDFs
17: - Server-side PDF with signature + photos
18: - Polymorphic attachments (per-item + per-maintenance)
19: - In-app notifications + web push
20: - Hybrid next-maintenance (frequency + agreed + override)
21: - Mobile-first responsive UI
22: 
23: ### Out of Scope
24: - Forgot-password (manual DB reset for MVP)
25: - Multi-tenant, offline/PWA, native mobile, email notifications
26: - Admin panel, billing, multi-language
27: 
28: ## Capabilities
29: 
30: ### New
31: - `user-auth`: JWT login, técnico accounts
32: - `client-management`: CRUD, cards, next-maintenance model
33: - `equipment-management`: CRUD per client
34: - `action-types`: dynamic CRUD, inline creation
35: - `maintenance-workflow`: selection, logging, templates, signature, PDF
36: - `pdf-generation`: server-side, signature, photos
37: - `maintenance-attachments`: polymorphic, local storage
38: - `client-history`: list with linked PDFs
39: - `notifications`: in-app + web push
40: - `templates`: pre-saved equipment sets
41: 
42: ### Modified
43: None (greenfield).
44: 
45: ## Approach
46: 
47: - **Frontend**: Vue 3 + Vite + Tailwind, Pinia, `signature_pad`
48: - **Backend**: Node.js + Express + Prisma + PostgreSQL, PNPM monorepo
49: - **PDF**: Puppeteer rendering HTML templates
50: - **Storage**: Local `uploads/`, S3 later
51: - **Auth**: bcrypt + short-lived JWT
52: 
53: ## Affected Areas
54: 
55: | Area | Impact |
56: |------|--------|
57: | `packages/frontend/` | New — Vue app, components, router, stores |
58: | `packages/backend/` | New — Node API, services, Prisma schema |
59: | `packages/backend/src/pdf/` | New — Puppeteer PDF rendering |
60: | `prisma/` | New — 9 tables (users→templates) |
61: 
62: ## Risks
63: 
64: | Risk | Likelihood | Mitigation |
65: |------|-----------|------------|
66: | Puppeteer memory/CPU | Med | Fallback to PDFKit |
67: | Photo uploads slow on mobile | Med | Client-side resize |
68: | Web push needs HTTPS | Low | HTTPS from day one |
69: 
70: ## Rollback Plan
71: 
72: Greenfield — discard branch if stalled. Revert deployment tag; PostgreSQL persists independently.
73: 
74: ## Dependencies
75: 
76: - Node.js ≥ 20, PNPM, PostgreSQL ≥ 15, Puppeteer, VAPID keys, `signature_pad`
77: 
78: ## Success Criteria
79: 
80: - [ ] Login + client cards on mobile and desktop
81: - [ ] Full flow: select → log → sign → PDF
82: - [ ] PDF includes details, actions, photos, signature
83: - [ ] Templates skip manual equipment selection
84: - [ ] Client history with downloadable PDFs
85: - [ ] Web push for upcoming maintenance
86: - [ ] Usable on 375px screen
87: - [ ] One codebase for mobile + desktop

(End of file - total 87 lines)
</content>
```

<content>
1: # Client Management Specification
2: 
3: ## Purpose
4: 
5: Manage clients as shared cards with contact details, location, and a hybrid next-maintenance date computed from frequency, agreed date, and manual override.
6: 
7: ## Requirements
8: 
9: ### Requirement: Client CRUD
10: 
11: The system SHALL support create, read, update, and delete operations for clients. All técnicos share the same client list.
12: 
13: #### Scenario: Create a client
14: 
15: - GIVEN a técnico on the client list page
16: - WHEN they fill the client form (name, location, contact) and submit
17: - THEN the client appears in the shared card list
18: 
19: #### Scenario: Edit a client
20: 
21: - GIVEN an existing client card
22: - WHEN a técnico updates the contact phone and saves
23: - THEN the card reflects the new phone for all técnicos
24: 
25: #### Scenario: Delete a client
26: 
27: - GIVEN an existing client with no linked maintenances
28: - WHEN a técnico deletes the client
29: - THEN the client is removed and returns 204
30: 
31: #### Scenario: Prevent delete with history
32: 
33: - GIVEN an existing client with past maintenances
34: - WHEN a técnico attempts deletion
35: - THEN the system returns 409 and preserves the client
36: 
37: ### Requirement: Hybrid next-maintenance model
38: 
39: The system SHALL maintain three next-maintenance states per client: base (computed from frequency), agreed (técnico-suggested), and effective (final override).
40: 
41: #### Scenario: Auto-suggest base date
42: 
43: - GIVEN a client with frequency_days = 30 and last maintenance on 2026-06-01
44: - WHEN the system recalculates next maintenance
45: - THEN next_maintenance_base_at is set to 2026-07-01
46: 
47: #### Scenario: Override effective date
48: 
49: - GIVEN a client with base date 2026-07-01
50: - WHEN a técnico manually sets next_maintenance_at to 2026-07-15
51: - THEN the effective date is 2026-07-15
52: - AND base and agreed dates remain visible for reference
53: 
54: #### Scenario: Agreed date differs from base
55: 
56: - GIVEN a client with base date 2026-07-01
57: - WHEN a técnico sets next_maintenance_agreed_at to 2026-07-10
58: - THEN the effective date updates to the agreed date unless manually overridden
59: 
60: ### Requirement: Client cards responsive layout
61: 
62: The system SHALL render client cards in a responsive grid usable on 375px screens.
63: 
64: #### Scenario: Mobile view
65: 
66: - GIVEN a viewport width of 375px
67: - WHEN the client list loads
68: - THEN cards stack vertically with tappable areas ≥ 44x44px

(End of file - total 68 lines)
</content>
```

1: # Equipment Management Specification
2: 
3: ## Purpose
4: 
5: Manage equipment per client with network identifiers, assignment, and status tracking.
6: 
7: ## Requirements
8: 
9: ### Requirement: Equipment CRUD per client
10: 
11: The system SHALL allow CRUD operations for equipment linked to a specific client.
12: 
13: #### Scenario: Add equipment to a client
14: 
15: - GIVEN a client "Acme Corp"
16: - WHEN a técnico adds a workstation with IP 192.168.1.10, MAC aa:bb:cc:dd:ee:ff, serial SN123
17: - THEN the equipment appears under Acme Corp’s detail page
18: 
19: #### Scenario: Edit equipment
20: 
21: - GIVEN an existing equipment entry
22: - WHEN a técnico updates the assigned user to "Maria Gomez"
23: - THEN the change is persisted and visible immediately
24: 
25: #### Scenario: Delete equipment
26: 
27: - GIVEN an equipment entry with no maintenance history
28: - WHEN a técnico deletes it
29: - THEN the equipment is removed
30: 
31: #### Scenario: Prevent delete with maintenance history
32: 
33: - GIVEN equipment referenced in at least one maintenance record
34: - WHEN a técnico attempts deletion
35: - THEN the system returns 409 and prevents removal
36: 
37: ### Requirement: Equipment fields
38: 
39: The system SHALL store IP address, MAC address, serial number, assigned user name, and status per equipment.
40: 
41: #### Scenario: Validation of IP format
42: 
43: - GIVEN a técnico enters IP "999.999.999.999"
44: - WHEN saving the equipment
45: - THEN the system rejects with a validation error
46: 
47: #### Scenario: Validation of MAC format
48: 
49: - GIVEN a técnico enters MAC "invalid-mac"
50: - WHEN saving the equipment
51: - THEN the system rejects with a validation error
52: 
53: #### Scenario: Status options
54: 
55: - GIVEN the equipment form
56: - WHEN the status dropdown renders
57: - THEN it includes at minimum: Active, Inactive, Under maintenance, Decommissioned
58: 
59: ### Requirement: Equipment list view
60: 
61: The system SHALL display a filterable list of equipment per client.
62: 
63: #### Scenario: Filter by status
64: 
65: - GIVEN 10 equipment entries with mixed statuses
66: - WHEN a técnico filters by "Active"
67: - THEN only active equipment is shown

(End of file - total 67 lines)
</content>

1: # Action Types Specification
2: 
3: ## Purpose
4: 
5: Provide dynamic, técnico-created action types for maintenance items, pre-seeded with common defaults.
6: 
7: ## Requirements
8: 
9: ### Requirement: Dynamic action type CRUD
10: 
11: The system SHALL allow técnicos to create, list, and update action types. Action types MAY be soft-deleted if unused.
12: 
13: #### Scenario: Create a new action type inline
14: 
15: - GIVEN a maintenance form with an action type dropdown
16: - WHEN a técnico selects "+ Nuevo tipo", enters "Migración", and confirms
17: - THEN the type is saved and immediately selectable for that maintenance item
18: 
19: #### Scenario: List existing types
20: 
21: - GIVEN the maintenance form
22: - WHEN the action type dropdown opens
23: - THEN it shows all global and técnico-created types sorted alphabetically
24: 
25: #### Scenario: Prevent deletion of used type
26: 
27: - GIVEN an action type referenced by at least one maintenance item
28: - WHEN a técnico attempts to delete it
29: - THEN the system returns 409 and preserves the type
30: 
31: ### Requirement: Pre-seeded defaults
32: 
33: The system SHALL seed the following default action types on first deployment: Mantención preventiva, Corrección, Reemplazo, Instalación, Otro.
34: 
35: #### Scenario: Defaults present on fresh install
36: 
37: - GIVEN a newly initialized database
38: - WHEN a técnico opens the action type dropdown
39: - THEN the five default types are visible
40: 
41: ### Requirement: Visual differentiation
42: 
43: The system SHOULD support optional color or icon per action type to differentiate cards visually.
44: 
45: #### Scenario: Type with color renders
46: 
47: - GIVEN an action type with color #ff0000
48: - WHEN a maintenance card using this type is displayed
49: - THEN the card shows a visual indicator of the color

(End of file - total 49 lines)
</content>
```

8: 
9: const ACCESS_COOKIE_OPTIONS = {
10:   httpOnly: true,
11:   secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === "production",
12:   sameSite: "lax" as const,
13:   maxAge: 15 * 60 * 1000, // 15 minutes
14:   path: "/",
15: };
16: 
17: const REFRESH_COOKIE_OPTIONS = {
18:   httpOnly: true,
19:   secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === "production",
20:   sameSite: "lax" as const,
21:   maxAge: 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000, // 7 days
22:   path: "/api/auth/refresh",
23: };
24: 
25: // POST /api/auth/login
26: authRouter.post("/login", validate(loginSchema), async (req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction) => {
27:   try {
28:     const { username, password } = req.body;
29:     const result = await login(username, password);
30: 
31:     res
32:       .cookie("accessToken", result.accessToken, ACCESS_COOKIE_OPTIONS)
33:       .cookie("refreshToken", result.refreshToken, REFRESH_COOKIE_OPTIONS)
34:       .status(200)
35:       .json({ user: result.user });
36:   } catch (error) {
37:     next(error);
38:   }
39: });
40: 
41: // POST /api/auth/logout
42: authRouter.post("/logout", authMiddleware, (_req: Request, res: Response) => {
43:   res
44:     .clearCookie("accessToken", { path: "/" })
45:     .clearCookie("refreshToken", { path: "/api/auth/refresh" })
46:     .status(204)
47:     .send();
48: });
49: 
50: // GET /api/auth/me
51: authRouter.get("/me", authMiddleware, async (req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction) => {
52:   try {
53:     const result = await getMe(req.user!.userId);
54:     res.json(result);
55:   } catch (error) {
56:     next(error);
57:   }
58: });
59: 
60: // POST /api/auth/refresh
61: authRouter.post("/refresh", async (req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction) => {
62:   try {
63:     const refreshToken = req.cookies?.refreshToken;
64:     if (!refreshToken) {
65:       res.status(401).json({ error: "No refresh token" });
66:       return;
67:     }
68: 
69:     const result = refresh(refreshToken);
70: 
71:     res
72:       .cookie("accessToken", result.accessToken, ACCESS_COOKIE_OPTIONS)
73:       .status(200)
74:       .json({ message: "Token refreshed" });
75:   } catch (error) {
76:     res
77:       .clearCookie("accessToken", { path: "/" })
78:       .clearCookie("refreshToken", { path: "/api/auth/refresh" });
79:     next(error);
80:   }
81: });

(End of file - total 81 lines)
</content>

1: import argon2 from "argon2";
2: import jwt from "jsonwebtoken";
3: import prisma from "../../lib/prisma";
4: import { getEnv } from "../../config/env";
5: import { createError } from "../../middleware/error-handler";
6: import type { User } from "@mantenti/types";
7: 
8: interface TokenPayload {
9:   userId: string;
10:   username: string;
11: }
12: 
13: export function generateAccessToken(payload: TokenPayload): string {
14:   const env = getEnv();
15:   return jwt.sign(payload, env.JWT_ACCESS_SECRET, {
16:     expiresIn: env.JWT_ACCESS_EXPIRES_IN as any,
17:   });
18: }
19: 
20: export function generateRefreshToken(payload: TokenPayload): string {
21:   const env = getEnv();
22:   return jwt.sign(payload, env.JWT_REFRESH_SECRET, {
23:     expiresIn: env.JWT_REFRESH_EXPIRES_IN as any,
24:   });
25: }
26: 
27: export function verifyAccessToken(token: string): TokenPayload {
28:   const env = getEnv();
29:   return jwt.verify(token, env.JWT_ACCESS_SECRET) as TokenPayload;
30: }
31: 
32: export function verifyRefreshToken(token: string): TokenPayload {
33:   const env = getEnv();
34:   return jwt.verify(token, env.JWT_REFRESH_SECRET) as TokenPayload;
35: }
36: 
37: function sanitizeUser(user: { id: string; username: string; fullName: string; createdAt: Date; updatedAt: Date }): User {
38:   return {
39:     id: user.id,
40:     username: user.username,
41:     fullName: user.fullName,
42:     createdAt: user.createdAt.toISOString(),
43:     updatedAt: user.updatedAt.toISOString(),
44:   };
45: }
46: 
47: export async function login(username: string, password: string) {
48:   const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({ where: { username } });
49:   if (!user) {
50:     throw createError(401, "Invalid credentials");
51:   }
52: 
53:   const valid = await argon2.verify(user.passwordHash, password);
54:   if (!valid) {
55:     throw createError(401, "Invalid credentials");
56:   }
57: 
58:   const payload: TokenPayload = { userId: user.id, username: user.username };
59:   const accessToken = generateAccessToken(payload);
60:   const refreshToken = generateRefreshToken(payload);
61: 
62:   return {
63:     user: sanitizeUser(user),
64:     accessToken,
65:     refreshToken,
66:   };
67: }
68: 
69: export async function getMe(userId: string) {
70:   const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({ where: { id: userId } });
71:   if (!user) {
72:     throw createError(404, "User not found");
73:   }
74:   return { user: sanitizeUser(user) };
75: }
76: 
77: export function refresh(refreshToken: string) {
78:   const payload = verifyRefreshToken(refreshToken);
79:   const newAccessToken = generateAccessToken({
80:     userId: payload.userId,
81:     username: payload.username,
82:   });
83:   return { accessToken: newAccessToken };
84: }

(End of file - total 84 lines)
</content>

<type>file</type>
<content>
1: import type { Request, Response, NextFunction } from "express";
2: import { ZodError } from "zod";
3: import { JsonWebTokenError, TokenExpiredError } from "jsonwebtoken";
4: 
5: export interface AppError extends Error {
6:   statusCode: number;
7:   isOperational: boolean;
8: }
9: 
10: export function createError(statusCode: number, message: string): AppError {
11:   const error = new Error(message) as AppError;
12:   error.statusCode = statusCode;
13:   error.isOperational = true;
14:   return error;
15: }
16: 
17: export function errorHandler(
18:   err: Error,
19:   _req: Request,
20:   res: Response,
21:   _next: NextFunction
22: ): void {
23:   if (err instanceof ZodError) {
24:     res.status(400).json({
25:       error: "Validation error",
26:       details: err.issues.map((i) => ({
27:         path: i.path.join("."),
28:         message: i.message,
29:       })),
30:     });
31:     return;
32:   }
33: 
34:   if (err instanceof TokenExpiredError) {
35:     res.status(401).json({ error: "Token expired" });
36:     return;
37:   }
38: 
39:   if (err instanceof JsonWebTokenError) {
40:     res.status(401).json({ error: "Invalid token" });
41:     return;
42:   }
43: 
44:   const appError = err as AppError;
45:   const statusCode = appError.statusCode || 500;
46:   const message = appError.isOperational ? appError.message : "Internal server error";
47: 
48:   if (statusCode >= 500) {
49:     console.error("Unhandled error:", err);
50:   }
51: 
52:   res.status(statusCode).json({ error: message });
53: }

(End of file - total 53 lines)
</content>
```

1: import { defineStore } from "pinia";
2: import { ref } from "vue";
3: import api from "@/lib/api";
4: import type { User } from "@mantenti/types";
5: 
6: export const useAuthStore = defineStore("auth", () => {
7:   const user = ref<User | null>(null);
8:   const checked = ref(false);
9:   const loading = ref(false);
10:   const error = ref<string | null>(null);
11: 
12:   async function login(username: string, password: string) {
13:     loading.value = true;
14:     error.value = null;
15:     try {
16:       const { data } = await api.post<{ user: User }>("/auth/login", {
17:         username,
18:         password,
19:       });
20:       user.value = data.user;
21:     } catch (err: any) {
22:       error.value = err.response?.data?.error || "Login failed";
23:       throw err;
24:     } finally {
25:       loading.value = false;
26:     }
27:   }
28: 
29:   async function logout() {
30:     try {
31:       await api.post("/auth/logout");
32:     } finally {
33:       user.value = null;
34:     }
35:   }
36: 
37:   async function checkAuth() {
38:     try {
39:       const { data } = await api.get<{ user: User }>("/auth/me");
40:       user.value = data.user;
41:     } catch {
42:       user.value = null;
43:     } finally {
44:       checked.value = true;
45:     }
46:   }
47: 
48:   return { user, checked, loading, error, login, logout, checkAuth };
49: });

1: import axios from "axios";
2: import router from "@/router";
3: 
4: const api = axios.create({
5:   baseURL: "/api",
6:   withCredentials: true,
7:   headers: {
8:     "Content-Type": "application/json",
9:   },
10: });
11: 
12: // Response interceptor: handle 401 → try refresh → retry
13: let isRefreshing = false;
14: let failedQueue: Array<{
15:   resolve: (value: unknown) => void;
16:   reject: (reason?: unknown) => void;
17: }> = [];
18: 
19: function processQueue(error: unknown) {
20:   failedQueue.forEach((prom) => {
21:     if (error) {
22:       prom.reject(error);
23:     } else {
24:       prom.resolve(undefined);
25:     }
26:   });
27:   failedQueue = [];
28: }
29: 
30: api.interceptors.response.use(
31:   (response) => response,
32:   async (error) => {
33:     const originalRequest = error.config;
34: 
35:     if (error.response?.status === 401 && !originalRequest._retry) {
36:       if (isRefreshing) {
37:         return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
38:           failedQueue.push({ resolve, reject });
39:         }).then(() => api(originalRequest));
40:       }
41: 
42:       originalRequest._retry = true;
43:       isRefreshing = true;
44: 
45:       try {
46:         await axios.post("/api/auth/refresh", {}, { withCredentials: true });
47:         processQueue(null);
48:         return api(originalRequest);
49:       } catch (refreshError) {
50:         processQueue(refreshError);
51:         router.push({ name: "login" });
52:         return Promise.reject(refreshError);
53:       } finally {
54:         isRefreshing = false;
55:       }
56:     }
57: 
58:     return Promise.reject(error);
59:   }
60: );
61: 
62: export default api;

(End of file - total 62 lines)
</content>
```

2: import { verifyAccessToken } from "../modules/auth/auth.service";

4: // Extend Express Request type
5: declare global {
6:   namespace Express {
7:     interface Request {
8:       user?: {
9:         userId: string;
10:         username: string;
11:       };
12:     }
13:   }
14: }
15: 
16: export function authMiddleware(req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction): void {
17:   const token = req.cookies?.accessToken;
18: 
19:   if (!token) {
20:     res.status(401).json({ error: "Authentication required" });
21:     return;
22:   }
23: 
24:   try {
25:     const payload = verifyAccessToken(token);
26:     req.user = payload;
27:     next();
28:   } catch (error) {
29:     res.status(401).json({ error: "Invalid or expired token" });
30:   }
31: }

(End of file - total 31 lines)
</content>

31:   contactPhone            String?   @map("contact_phone")

39: 
40:   equipment    Equipment[]

43: 
44:   @@index([nextMaintenanceAt])

48: // ─── Equipment ───────────────────────────────────────────

58:   createdAt  DateTime        @default(now()) @map("created_at")
59:   updatedAt  DateTime        @updatedAt @map("updated_at")
60: 
61:   client           Client            @relation(fields: [clientId], references: [id])
62:   maintenanceItems MaintenanceItem[]
63:   templateItems    TemplateItem[]
64: 
65:   @@index([clientId])
66:   @@map("equipment")
67: }
68: 
69: enum EquipmentStatus {

71:   INACTIVE
72:   UNDER_MAINTENANCE
73:   DECOMMISSIONED
74: }
75: 
76: // ─── Action Types ────────────────────────────────────────
77: model ActionType {
78:   id        String   @id @default(uuid())
79:   name      String   @unique
80:   color     String?
81:   icon      String?
82:   isDefault Boolean  @default(false) @map("is_default")
83:   createdAt DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")
84: 
85:   maintenanceItems MaintenanceItem[]
86: 
87:   @@map("action_types")
88: }
89: 
90: // ─── Maintenances ────────────────────────────────────────
91: model Maintenance {
92:   id            String            @id @default(uuid())
93:   clientId      String            @map("client_id")
94:   technicianId  String            @map("technician_id")
95:   status        MaintenanceStatus @default(DRAFT)
96:   notes         String?
97:   signatureData String?           @map("signature_data")

102:   updatedAt     DateTime          @updatedAt @map("updated_at")
103: 
104:   client      Client            @relation(fields: [clientId], references: [id])
105:   technician  User              @relation(fields: [technicianId], references: [id])
106:   items       MaintenanceItem[]
107: 
108:   @@index([clientId, createdAt(sort: Desc)])
109:   @@index([status])
110:   @@map("maintenances")
111: }
112: 
113: enum MaintenanceStatus {
114:   DRAFT
115:   IN_PROGRESS
116:   CLOSED
117: }
118: 
119: // ─── Maintenance Items ───────────────────────────────────
120: model MaintenanceItem {
121:   id            String    @id @default(uuid())
122:   maintenanceId String    @map("maintenance_id")
123:   equipmentId   String    @map("equipment_id")
124:   actionTypeId  String?   @map("action_type_id")
125:   observations  String?
126:   completedAt   DateTime? @map("completed_at")
127:   createdAt     DateTime  @default(now()) @map("created_at")
128:   updatedAt     DateTime  @updatedAt @map("updated_at")
129: 
130:   maintenance Maintenance  @relation(fields: [maintenanceId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
131:   equipment   Equipment    @relation(fields: [equipmentId], references: [id])
132:   actionType  ActionType?  @relation(fields: [actionTypeId], references: [id])
133: 
134:   @@unique([maintenanceId, equipmentId])
135:   @@map("maintenance_items")
136: }
137: 
138: // ─── Attachments (Polymorphic) ───────────────────────────
139: model Attachment {
140:   id          String           @id @default(uuid())
141:   scope       AttachmentScope
142:   parentId    String           @map("parent_id")
143:   fileName    String           @map("file_name")
144:   mimeType    String           @map("mime_type")
145:   sizeBytes   Int              @map("size_bytes")
146:   storagePath String           @map("storage_path")
147:   createdAt   DateTime         @default(now()) @map("created_at")
148: 
149:   @@index([scope, parentId])
150:   @@map("attachments")
151: }
152: 
153: enum AttachmentScope {
154:   MAINTENANCE
155:   MAINTENANCE_ITEM
156: }
157: 
158: // ─── Templates ───────────────────────────────────────────
159: model Template {
160:   id          String   @id @default(uuid())
161:   clientId    String   @map("client_id")
162:   name        String
163:   description String?
164:   createdAt   DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")
165:   updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt @map("updated_at")
166: 
167:   client Client         @relation(fields: [clientId], references: [id])
168:   items  TemplateItem[]
169: 
170:   @@unique([clientId, name])
171:   @@map("templates")
172: }
173: 
174: // ─── Template Items ──────────────────────────────────────
175: model TemplateItem {
176:   id          String @id @default(uuid())
177:   templateId  String @map("template_id")
178:   equipmentId String @map("equipment_id")
179:   sortOrder   Int    @default(0) @map("sort_order")
180: 
181:   template  Template  @relation(fields: [templateId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
182:   equipment Equipment @relation(fields: [equipmentId], references: [id])
183: 
184:   @@unique([templateId, equipmentId])
185:   @@map("template_items")
186: }
187: 
188: // ─── Notifications ───────────────────────────────────────

199:

212:

  "filePath": "C:\\Users\\User\\Desktop\\Peguita\\Codigos wao\\APP manten\\apps\\api\\src\\modules\\clients\\clients.service.ts",
  "content": "import prisma from \"../../lib/prisma\";\nimport { createError } from \"../../middleware/error-handler\";\nimport type { CreateClientInput, UpdateClientInput } from \"./clients.schema\";\n\nfunction computeEffectiveDate(\n  baseAt: Date | null,\n  agreedAt: Date | null,\n  manualOverride: Date | null\n): Date | null {\n  return manualOverride ?? agreedAt ?? baseAt;\n}\n\nexport async function listClients(query?: string) {\n  const where = query\n    ? {\n        name: { contains: query, mode: \"insensitive\" as const },\n      }\n    : {};\n\n  const clients = await prisma.client.findMany({\n    where,\n    orderBy: { name: \"asc\" },\n    include: {\n      _count: { select: { equipment: true } },\n    },\n  });\n\n  return clients.map(({ _count, ...client }) => ({\n    ...client,\n    equipmentCount: _count.equipment,\n  }));\n}\n\nexport async function getClient(id: string) {\n  const client = await prisma.client.findUnique({\n    where: { id },\n    include: {\n      equipment: { orderBy: { name: \"asc\" } },\n      templates: { orderBy: { name: \"asc\" } },\n      _count: { select: { equipment: true } },\n    },\n  });\n\n  if (!client) {\n    throw createError(404, \"Client not found\");\n  }\n\n  const { _count, ...rest } = client;\n  return { ...rest, equipmentCount: _count.equipment };\n}\n\nexport async function createClient(input: CreateClientInput) {\n  // Compute base date if frequency is provided\n  let nextMaintenanceBaseAt: Date | null = null;\n  if (input.frequencyDays) {\n    nextMaintenanceBaseAt = new Date();\n    nextMaintenanceBaseAt.setDate(nextMaintenanceBaseAt.getDate() + input.frequencyDays);\n  }\n\n  const client = await prisma.client.create({\n    data: {\n      name: input.name,\n      location: input.location,\n      contactName: input.contactName,\n      contactPhone: input.contactPhone,\n      contactEmail: input.contactEmail,\n      frequencyDays: input.frequencyDays,\n      nextMaintenanceBaseAt,\n      nextMaintenanceAt: nextMaintenanceBaseAt, // effective defaults to base\n    },\n  });\n\n  return client;\n}\n\nexport async function updateClient(id: string, input: UpdateClientInput) {\n  const existing = await prisma.client.findUnique({ where: { id } });\n  if (!existing) {\n    throw createError(404, \"Client not found\");\n  }\n\n  // Recompute base if frequency changed\n  let nextMaintenanceBaseAt = existing.nextMaintenanceBaseAt;\n  if (input.frequencyDays !== undefined) {\n    if (input.frequencyDays === null) {\n      nextMaintenanceBaseAt = null;\n    } else {\n      // Recalculate from last closed maintenance or from now\n      const lastMaintenance = await prisma.maintenance.findFirst({\n        where: { clientId: id, status: \"CLOSED\" },\n        orderBy: { closedAt: \"desc\" },\n        select: { closedAt: true },\n      });\n\n      const baseDate = lastMaintenance?.closedAt ?? new Date();\n      nextMaintenanceBaseAt = new Date(baseDate);\n      nextMaintenanceBaseAt.setDate(nextMaintenanceBaseAt.getDate() + input.frequencyDays);\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Parse agreed date\n  let nextMaintenanceAgreedAt = existing.nextMaintenanceAgreedAt;\n  if (input.nextMaintenanceAgreedAt !== undefined) {\n    nextMaintenanceAgreedAt = input.nextMaintenanceAgreedAt\n      ? new Date(input.nextMaintenanceAgreedAt)\n      : null;\n  }\n\n  // Compute effective date\n  let nextMaintenanceAt: Date | null;\n  if (input.nextMaintenanceAt !== undefined) {\n    // Manual override takes precedence\n    nextMaintenanceAt = input.nextMaintenanceAt\n      ? new Date(input.nextMaintenanceAt)\n      : null;\n  } else {\n    // Recompute from existing override or agreed/base\n    nextMaintenanceAt = computeEffectiveDate(\n      nextMaintenanceBaseAt,\n      nextMaintenanceAgreedAt,\n      null // no new override — let agreed/base decide\n    );\n  }\n\n  const client = await prisma.client.update({\n    where: { id },\n    data: {\n      ...(input.name !== undefined && { name: input.name }),\n      ...(input.location !== undefined && { location: input.location }),\n      ...(input.contactName !== undefined && { contactName: input.contactName }),\n      ...(input.contactPhone !== undefined && { contactPhone: input.contactPhone }),\n      ...(input.contactEmail !== undefined && { contactEmail: input.contactEmail }),\n      ...(input.frequencyDays !== undefined && { frequencyDays: input.frequencyDays }),\n      nextMaintenanceBaseAt,\n      nextMaintenanceAgreedAt,\n      nextMaintenanceAt,\n    },\n  });\n\n  return client;\n}\n\nexport async function deleteClient(id: string) {\n  const existing = await prisma.client.findUnique({ where: { id } });\n  if (!existing) {\n    throw createError(404, \"Client not found\");\n  }\n\n  // Check for maintenance history\n  const maintenanceCount = await prisma.maintenance.count({\n    where: { clientId: id },\n  });\n\n  if (maintenanceCount > 0) {\n    throw createError(409, \"Cannot delete client with maintenance history\");\n  }\n\n  await prisma.client.delete({ where: { id } });\n}\n"
}

{
  "filePath": "C:\\Users\\User\\Desktop\\Peguita\\Codigos wao\\APP manten\\apps\\api\\src\\modules\\clients\\clients.controller.ts",
  "content": "import { Router, type IRouter, type Request, type Response, type NextFunction } from \"express\";\nimport { createClientSchema, updateClientSchema, clientQuerySchema } from \"./clients.schema\";\nimport { listClients, getClient, createClient, updateClient, deleteClient } from \"./clients.service\";\nimport { validate } from \"../../middleware/validate\";\nimport { authMiddleware } from \"../../middleware/auth\";\n\nexport const clientsRouter: IRouter = Router();\n\n// All routes require auth\nclientsRouter.use(authMiddleware);\n\n// GET /api/clients?q=\nclientsRouter.get(\"/\", validate(clientQuerySchema, \"query\"), async (req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction) => {\n  try {\n    const { q } = req.query as { q?: string };\n    const clients = await listClients(q);\n    res.json({ clients });\n  } catch (error) {\n    next(error);\n  }\n});\n\n// POST /api/clients\nclientsRouter.post(\"/\", validate(createClientSchema), async (req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction) => {\n  try {\n    const client = await createClient(req.body);\n    res.status(201).json({ client });\n  } catch (error) {\n    next(error);\n  }\n});\n\n// GET /api/clients/:id\nclientsRouter.get(\"/:id\", async (req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction) => {\n  try {\n    const result = await getClient(req.params.id);\n    res.json(result);\n  } catch (error) {\n    next(error);\n  }\n});\n\n// PATCH /api/clients/:id\nclientsRouter.patch(\"/:id\", validate(updateClientSchema), async (req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction) => {\n  try {\n    const client = await updateClient(req.params.id, req.body);\n    res.json({ client });\n  } catch (error) {\n    next(error);\n  }\n});\n\n// DELETE /api/clients/:id\nclientsRouter.delete(\"/:id\", async (req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction) => {\n  try {\n    await deleteClient(req.params.id);\n    res.status(204).send();\n  } catch (error) {\n    next(error);\n  }\n});\n"
}

{
  "filePath": "C:\\Users\\User\\Desktop\\Peguita\\Codigos wao\\APP manten\\apps\\api\\src\\modules\\equipment\\equipment.schema.ts",
  "content": "import { z } from \"zod\";\n\nconst equipmentStatusEnum = z.enum([\n  \"ACTIVE\",\n  \"INACTIVE\",\n  \"UNDER_MAINTENANCE\",\n  \"DECOMMISSIONED\",\n]);\n\nexport const createEquipmentSchema = z.object({\n  name: z.string().min(1, \"Name is required\").max(200),\n  ip: z\n    .string()\n    .regex(\n      /^(\\d{1,3}\\.){3}\\d{1,3}$/,\n      \"Invalid IP format (expected x.x.x.x)\"\n    )\n    .max(45)\n    .optional()\n    .or(z.literal(\"\")),\n  mac: z\n    .string()\n    .regex(\n      /^([0-9A-Fa-f]{2}[:-]){5}[0-9A-Fa-f]{2}$/,\n      \"Invalid MAC format (expected xx:xx:xx:xx:xx:xx)\"\n    )\n    .max(17)\n    .optional()\n    .or(z.literal(\"\")),\n  serial: z.string().max(100).optional(),\n  assignedTo: z.string().max(200).optional(),\n  status: equipmentStatusEnum.optional(),\n});\n\nexport const updateEquipmentSchema = z.object({\n  name: z.string().min(1).max(200).optional(),\n  ip: z\n    .string()\n    .regex(/^(\\d{1,3}\\.){3}\\d{1,3}$/, \"Invalid IP format\")\n    .max(45)\n    .nullable()\n    .optional(),\n  mac: z\n    .string()\n    .regex(/^([0-9A-Fa-f]{2}[:-]){5}[0-9A-Fa-f]{2}$/, \"Invalid MAC format\")\n    .max(17)\n    .nullable()\n    .optional(),\n  serial: z.string().max(100).nullable().optional(),\n  assignedTo: z.string().max(200).nullable().optional(),\n  status: equipmentStatusEnum.optional(),\n});\n\nexport const equipmentQuerySchema = z.object({\n  status: equipmentStatusEnum.optional(),\n});\n\nexport type CreateEquipmentInput = z.infer<typeof createEquipmentSchema>;\nexport type UpdateEquipmentInput = z.infer<typeof updateEquipmentSchema>;\n"
}

{
  "filePath": "C:\\Users\\User\\Desktop\\Peguita\\Codigos wao\\APP manten\\apps\\api\\src\\modules\\equipment\\equipment.service.ts",
  "content": "import prisma from \"../../lib/prisma\";\nimport { createError } from \"../../middleware/error-handler\";\nimport type { CreateEquipmentInput, UpdateEquipmentInput } from \"./equipment.schema\";\nimport type { EquipmentStatus } from \"@mantenti/types\";\n\nexport async function listEquipment(clientId: string, status?: EquipmentStatus) {\n  // Verify client exists\n  const client = await prisma.client.findUnique({ where: { id: clientId } });\n  if (!client) {\n    throw createError(404, \"Client not found\");\n  }\n\n  const where: { clientId: string; status?: EquipmentStatus } = { clientId };\n  if (status) {\n    where.status = status;\n  }\n\n  return prisma.equipment.findMany({\n    where,\n    orderBy: { name: \"asc\" },\n  });\n}\n\nexport async function getEquipment(id: string) {\n  const equipment = await prisma.equipment.findUnique({ where: { id } });\n  if (!equipment) {\n    throw createError(404, \"Equipment not found\");\n  }\n  return equipment;\n}\n\nexport async function createEquipment(clientId: string, input: CreateEquipmentInput) {\n  // Verify client exists\n  const client = await prisma.client.findUnique({ where: { id: clientId } });\n  if (!client) {\n    throw createError(404, \"Client not found\");\n  }\n\n  // Normalize empty strings to null\n  const data = {\n    clientId,\n    name: input.name,\n    ip: input.ip || null,\n    mac: input.mac || null,\n    serial: input.serial || null,\n    assignedTo: input.assignedTo || null,\n    status: input.status ?? \"ACTIVE\",\n  };\n\n  return prisma.equipment.create({ data });\n}\n\nexport async function updateEquipment(id: string, input: UpdateEquipmentInput) {\n  const existing = await prisma.equipment.findUnique({ where: { id } });\n  if (!existing) {\n    throw createError(404, \"Equipment not found\");\n  }\n\n  const data: Record<string, unknown> = {};\n  if (input.name !== undefined) data.name = input.name;\n  if (input.ip !== undefined) data.ip = input.ip;\n  if (input.mac !== undefined) data.mac = input.mac;\n  if (input.serial !== undefined) data.serial = input.serial;\n  if (input.assignedTo !== undefined) data.assignedTo = input.assignedTo;\n  if (input.status !== undefined) data.status = input.status;\n\n  return prisma.equipment.update({\n    where: { id },\n    data,\n  });\n}\n\nexport async function deleteEquipment(id: string) {\n  const existing = await prisma.equipment.findUnique({ where: { id } });\n  if (!existing) {\n    throw createError(404, \"Equipment not found\");\n  }\n\n  // Check for maintenance item references\n  const itemCount = await prisma.maintenanceItem.count({\n    where: { equipmentId: id },\n  });\n\n  if (itemCount > 0) {\n    throw createError(409, \"Cannot delete equipment with maintenance history\");\n  }\n\n  await prisma.equipment.delete({ where: { id } });\n}\n"
}

  "filePath": "C:\\Users\\User\\Desktop\\Peguita\\Codigos wao\\APP manten\\apps\\api\\src\\modules\\clients\\clients.controller.ts",
  "content": "import { Router, type IRouter, type Request, type Response, type NextFunction } from \"express\";\nimport { createClientSchema, updateClientSchema, clientQuerySchema } from \"./clients.schema\";\nimport { listClients, getClient, createClient, updateClient, deleteClient } from \"./clients.service\";\nimport { validate } from \"../../middleware/validate\";\nimport { authMiddleware } from \"../../middleware/auth\";\n\nexport const clientsRouter: IRouter = Router();\n\n// All routes require auth\nclientsRouter.use(authMiddleware);\n\n// GET /api/clients?q=\nclientsRouter.get(\"/\", validate(clientQuerySchema, \"query\"), async (req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction) => {\n  try {\n    const { q } = req.query as { q?: string };\n    const clients = await listClients(q);\n    res.json({ clients });\n  } catch (error) {\n    next(error);\n  }\n});\n\n// POST /api/clients\nclientsRouter.post(\"/\", validate(createClientSchema), async (req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction) => {\n  try {\n    const client = await createClient(req.body);\n    res.status(201).json({ client });\n  } catch (error) {\n    next(error);\n  }\n});\n\n// GET /api/clients/:id\nclientsRouter.get(\"/:id\", async (req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction) => {\n  try {\n    const id = Array.isArray(req.params.id) ? req.params.id[0] : req.params.id;\n    const result = await getClient(id);\n    res.json(result);\n  } catch (error) {\n    next(error);\n  }\n});\n\n// PATCH /api/clients/:id\nclientsRouter.patch(\"/:id\", validate(updateClientSchema), async (req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction) => {\n  try {\n    const id = Array.isArray(req.params.id) ? req.params.id[0] : req.params.id;\n    const client = await updateClient(id, req.body);\n    res.json({ client });\n  } catch (error) {\n    next(error);\n  }\n});\n\n// DELETE /api/clients/:id\nclientsRouter.delete(\"/:id\", async (req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction) => {\n  try {\n    const id = Array.isArray(req.params.id) ? req.params.id[0] : req.params.id;\n    await deleteClient(id);\n    res.status(204).send();\n  } catch (error) {\n    next(error);\n  }\n});\n"
}

  "content": "import { Router, type IRouter, type Request, type Response, type NextFunction } from \"express\";\nimport { createEquipmentSchema, updateEquipmentSchema, equipmentQuerySchema } from \"./equipment.schema\";\nimport { listEquipment, getEquipment, createEquipment, updateEquipment, deleteEquipment } from \"./equipment.service\";\nimport { validate } from \"../../middleware/validate\";\nimport { authMiddleware } from \"../../middleware/auth\";\nimport type { EquipmentStatus } from \"@mantenti/types\";\n\nexport const equipmentRouter: IRouter = Router();\n\n// All routes require auth\nequipmentRouter.use(authMiddleware);\n\n// Helper to safely extract param\nfunction getParam(val: string | string[]): string {\n  return Array.isArray(val) ? val[0] : val;\n}\n\n// GET /api/clients/:clientId/equipment?status=\nequipmentRouter.get(\n  \"/clients/:clientId/equipment\",\n  validate(equipmentQuerySchema, \"query\"),\n  async (req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction) => {\n    try {\n      const clientId = getParam(req.params.clientId);\n      const { status } = req.query as { status?: EquipmentStatus };\n      const equipment = await listEquipment(clientId, status);\n      res.json({ equipment });\n    } catch (error) {\n      next(error);\n    }\n  }\n);\n\n// POST /api/clients/:clientId/equipment\nequipmentRouter.post(\n  \"/clients/:clientId/equipment\",\n  validate(createEquipmentSchema),\n  async (req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction) => {\n    try {\n      const clientId = getParam(req.params.clientId);\n      const equipment = await createEquipment(clientId, req.body);\n      res.status(201).json({ equipment });\n    } catch (error) {\n      next(error);\n    }\n  }\n);\n\n// GET /api/equipment/:id\nequipmentRouter.get(\"/equipment/:id\", async (req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction) => {\n  try {\n    const id = getParam(req.params.id);\n    const equipment = await getEquipment(id);\n    res.json({ equipment });\n  } catch (error) {\n    next(error);\n  }\n});\n\n// PATCH /api/equipment/:id\nequipmentRouter.patch(\n  \"/equipment/:id\",\n  validate(updateEquipmentSchema),\n  async (req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction) => {\n    try {\n      const id = getParam(req.params.id);\n      const equipment = await updateEquipment(id, req.body);\n      res.json({ equipment });\n    } catch (error) {\n      next(error);\n    }\n  }\n);\n\n// DELETE /api/equipment/:id\nequipmentRouter.delete(\"/equipment/:id\", async (req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction) => {\n  try {\n    const id = getParam(req.params.id);\n    await deleteEquipment(id);\n    res.status(204).send();\n  } catch (error) {\n    next(error);\n  }\n});\n"
}

  "filePath": "C:\\Users\\User\\Desktop\\Peguita\\Codigos wao\\APP manten\\apps\\web\\src\\stores\\clients.ts",
  "content": "import { defineStore } from \"pinia\";\nimport { ref, computed } from \"vue\";\nimport api from \"@/lib/api\";\nimport type { Client, Equipment, Template } from \"@mantenti/types\";\n\ninterface ClientWithMeta extends Client {\n  equipmentCount: number;\n}\n\nexport const useClientStore = defineStore(\"clients\", () => {\n  const clients = ref<ClientWithMeta[]>([]);\n  const currentClient = ref<(Client & { equipment: Equipment[]; templates: Template[]; equipmentCount: number }) | null>(null);\n  const loading = ref(false);\n  const error = ref<string | null>(null);\n  const searchQuery = ref(\"\");\n\n  const filteredClients = computed(() => {\n    if (!searchQuery.value) return clients.value;\n    const q = searchQuery.value.toLowerCase();\n    return clients.value.filter(\n      (c) =>\n        c.name.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||\n        c.location?.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||\n        c.contactName?.toLowerCase().includes(q)\n    );\n  });\n\n  async function fetchClients(query?: string) {\n    loading.value = true;\n    error.value = null;\n    try {\n      const { data } = await api.get<{ clients: ClientWithMeta[] }>(\"/clients\", {\n        params: query ? { q: query } : {},\n      });\n      clients.value = data.clients;\n    } catch (err: any) {\n      error.value = err.response?.data?.error || \"Error loading clients\";\n    } finally {\n      loading.value = false;\n    }\n  }\n\n  async function fetchClient(id: string) {\n    loading.value = true;\n    error.value = null;\n    try {\n      const { data } = await api.get<{\n        client: Client;\n        equipment: Equipment[];\n        templates: Template[];\n        equipmentCount: number;\n      }>(`/clients/${id}`);\n      currentClient.value = data as any;\n    } catch (err: any) {\n      error.value = err.response?.data?.error || \"Error loading client\";\n    } finally {\n      loading.value = false;\n    }\n  }\n\n  async function createClient(input: Record<string, unknown>) {\n    loading.value = true;\n    error.value = null;\n    try {\n      const { data } = await api.post<{ client: Client }>(\"/clients\", input);\n      clients.value.push({ ...data.client, equipmentCount: 0 } as ClientWithMeta);\n      return data.client;\n    } catch (err: any) {\n      error.value = err.response?.data?.error || \"Error creating client\";\n      throw err;\n    } finally {\n      loading.value = false;\n    }\n  }\n\n  async function updateClient(id: string, input: Record<string, unknown>) {\n    loading.value = true;\n    error.value = null;\n    try {\n      const { data } = await api.patch<{ client: Client }>(`/clients/${id}`, input);\n      const idx = clients.value.findIndex((c) => c.id === id);\n      if (idx !== -1) {\n        clients.value[idx] = { ...clients.value[idx], ...data.client };\n      }\n      if (currentClient.value?.id === id) {\n        currentClient.value = { ...currentClient.value, ...data.client };\n      }\n      return data.client;\n    } catch (err: any) {\n      error.value = err.response?.data?.error || \"Error updating client\";\n      throw err;\n    } finally {\n      loading.value = false;\n    }\n  }\n\n  async function deleteClient(id: string) {\n    loading.value = true;\n    error.value = null;\n    try {\n      await api.delete(`/clients/${id}`);\n      clients.value = clients.value.filter((c) => c.id !== id);\n    } catch (err: any) {\n      error.value = err.response?.data?.error || \"Error deleting client\";\n      throw err;\n    } finally {\n      loading.value = false;\n    }\n  }\n\n  return {\n    clients,\n    currentClient,\n    loading,\n    error,\n    searchQuery,\n    filteredClients,\n    fetchClients,\n    fetchClient,\n    createClient,\n    updateClient,\n    deleteClient,\n  };\n});\n"
}

}\n      );\n      equipment.value = data.equipment;\n    } catch (err: any) {\n      error.value = err.response?.data?.error || \"Error loading equipment\";\n    } finally {\n      loading.value = loading.value = false;\n    }\n  }\n\n  return {\n    equipment,\n    loading,\n    error,\n    statusFilter,\n    fetchEquipment,\n    createEquipment,\n    updateEquipment,\n    deleteEquipment,\n  };\n});\n"

  "content": "<script setup lang=\"ts\">\nimport { ref, watch, computed } from \"vue\";\nimport type { Equipment, EquipmentStatus } from \"@mantenti/types\";\n\nconst STATUS_OPTIONS: { value: EquipmentStatus; label: string }[] = [\n  { value: \"ACTIVE\", label: \"Activo\" },\n  { value: \"INACTIVE\", label: \"Inactivo\" },\n  { value: \"UNDER_MAINTENANCE\", label: \"En mantención\" },\n  { value: \"DECOMMISSIONED\", label: \"Dado de baja\" },\n];\n\nconst props = defineProps<{\n  equipment?: Equipment | null;\n  loading?: boolean;\n}>();\n\nconst emit = defineEmits<{\n  submit: [data: Record<string, unknown>];\n  cancel: [];\n}>();\n\nconst form = ref({\n  name: \"\",\n  ip: \"\",\n  mac: \"\",\n  serial: \"\",\n  assignedTo: \"\",\n  status: \"ACTIVE\" as EquipmentStatus,\n});\n\nconst errors = ref<Record<string, string>({});\n\nwatch(\n  () => props.equipment,\n  (eq) => {\n    if (eq) {\n      form.value = {\n        name: eq.name,\n        ip: eq.ip ?? {
  "filePath": "C:\\Users\\User\\Desktop\\Peguita\\Codigos wao\\APP manten\\apps\\web\\src\\router\\index.ts",
  "content": "import { createRouter, createWebHistory } from \"vue-router\";\nimport { useAuthStore } from \"@/stores/auth\";\n\nconst router = createRouter({\n  history: createWebHistory(),\n  routes: [\n    {\n      path: \"/login\",\n      name: \"login\",\n      component: () => import(\"@/views/LoginPage.vue\"),\n      meta: { guest: true },\n    },\n    {\n      path: \"/\",\n      redirect: \"/clients\",\n    },\n    {\n      path: \"/clients\",\n      name: \"clients\",\n      component: () => import(\"@/views/ClientListPage.vue\"),\n      meta: { requiresAuth: true },\n    },\n    {\n      path: \"/clients/:id\",\n      name: \"client-detail\",\n      component: () => import(\"@/views/ClientDetailPage.vue\"),\n      meta: { requiresAuth: true },\n    },\n  ],\n});\n\nrouter.beforeEach(async (to) => {\n  const auth = useAuthStore();\n\n  // Try to restore session on first load\n  if (!auth.user && !auth.checked) {\n    await auth.checkAuth();\n  }\n\n  if (to.meta.requiresAuth && !auth.user) {\n    return { name: \"login\" };\n  }\n\n  if (to.meta.guest && auth.user) {\n    return { name: \"clients\" };\n  }\n});\n\nexport default router;\n"
}
